label: The Bar
title: The Glass Atrium
body1: The centerpiece of Coco Maya is the open-air glass atrium with a retractable roof that opens to the San Diego sky. Teal bar tiles, rattan bar chairs, hanging botanicals, and a cocktail program worth sitting down for.
body2: Whether the roof is open or closed, the atmosphere inside the atrium is unlike anything else in Little Italy.
imageAlt: Glass atrium bar at Coco Maya Little Italy San Diego

barDetail.title: The teal bar at the center of it all
barDetail.body1: The centerpiece of Coco Maya is the teal tile bar — a full-service craft cocktail program built under the glass atrium, surrounded by hanging botanicals and the arched architecture that makes this space instantly recognizable.
barDetail.body2: From the first margarita to the last negroni, every drink is made here. The bar seats guests directly, with rattan bar chairs and a marble counter that runs the full length of the space.
barDetail.imageAlt: The teal bar at Coco Maya Little Italy San Diego
